title: Low turnout could shape the 2027 French presidential race
subhead: Abstainers from the 2026 municipal elections could fuel a protest vote in the presidential election, writes Anne Muxel, emeritus research professor at CEVIPOF, based on an electoral survey for Le Monde.

title: 'Natural bread, more digestible and free of toxic substances, could be available to all if we changed the rules'
subhead: Paul Magnette, president of the French-speaking Socialist Party of Belgium, addresses concerns about bread consumption – a symbol of French culture – following a report on the presence of the heavy metal cadmium in certain cultivated plants, including wheat.

title: One year ahead of French presidential election, survey shows deep desire for change
subhead: Following the municipal elections, the political landscape is marked by a favorable perception of the far-right Rassemblement National and by highly polarized preferences among French voters, a Le Monde survey shows.

title: Pope embarks on African tour, a strategic continent for Catholicism
subhead: From April 13 to 23, Pope Léon XIV is set to visit Algeria, Cameroon, Angola and Equatorial Guinea. The trip symbolizes the shift in the center of gravity of the Catholic Church, whose future now lies in Africa.
